title: Allow undock connection tab to new mRemote program instance and allow merge connection tab back to first program instance
author: igor2x
body_snippet:
I have been using mRemoteNG for years. Currently I am using mRemoteNG officially stable version 1.76.20 on Windows 10.
    1. Open SSH connection to e.g. Linux computer and do some tasks.
    2. Open new SSH connection to the same remote computer.
    3. Now both windows (in both tabs) have some tasks executing.
       
       Sometimes I would like to have two mRemote programs each tab in its own program. In Firefox web browser for example I just click on tab and hold down to middle of win...

iterations.description: This is a feature request to undock/redock connection tabs between mRemoteNG instances, which requires significant UI/UX design decisions and confirmation that it's still desired on the current build before committing to implementation.
Repass confirmed: Undock/redock tabs between OS-level instances requires major IPC architecture

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: it will not simple to do (at least dont see how on top of my head) if you run two mRemoteNG programs, however in curent NB versions panels allow you to do such by drag and drop, but its a some issues with operation, was planed to have a look on such this weekend perhaps so will check you suggestion as well.

notes: Feature request: undock tab to new instance. Requires major window management architecture.
